Name: Emerald Botanical V neck  Top
Description:
An elevated expression of contemporary femininity, the Emerald Botanica Blouse is designed for the woman who commands attention effortlessly. Featuring an artfully layered botanical print in deep emerald, muted gold, and shadowed charcoal tones, this piece embodies refined sophistication.
The fluid drape and tailored silhouette sculpt beautifully along the body, while the soft V-neckline enhances grace with subtle allure. Designed to transition seamlessly from executive meetings to evening soirées, this blouse is a statement of quiet luxury.

Signature Details

• Exclusive abstract botanical print
• Sculpted V-neckline
• Precision-tailored cuffs
• Luxe lightweight silk-blend finish
• Elegant structured yet fluid fall
• Designed for elevated everyday dressing

Craftsmanship & Fabric

Meticulously crafted from a premium silk-blend fabric, offering a smooth, breathable, and feather-light feel against the skin. The fabric’s soft sheen enhances the richness of the print, ensuring a polished look at every angle.
Care: Gentle cold wash or dry clean recommended.

Fit & Silhouette

• Tailored regular fit
• True to size
• Model wears Size S

Styling Notes

Pair with high-waisted tailored trousers for executive refinement, or style with premium denim and statement heels for understated glamour.

Name: Midnight Bloom
Description:
Effortlessly chic and perfect for warm days, this floral summer top blends elegance with everyday comfort. Crafted in a lightweight fabric, the piece features a delicate floral print on a deep base, creating a timeless yet modern look. The square neckline and wide straps offer a flattering silhouette, while the adjustable tie-back detail adds both style and a customizable fit. Designed to pair beautifully with denim, trousers, or skirts, this top is an ideal choice for casual outings, brunch dates, or summer evenings.

Details

Floral printed fabric Square neckline Sleeveless with wide straps Adjustable tie-back closure Relaxed yet flattering fit

Style Tip:

Pair it with light denim or neutral trousers and minimal accessories for an effortless summer look.

Name: Sunlit corset
Description:
Step into effortless elegance with our Golden Hour Floral Kurti, designed to capture the warmth and glow of sunlit days. Crafted in a vibrant yellow floral print, this piece brings together comfort, charm, and modern ethnic style.

The kurti features a structured silhouette with delicate front button detailing, adding a refined touch while maintaining a relaxed and flattering fit. Perfect for casual outings, brunch dates, or daytime gatherings, it blends contemporary fashion with timeless grace.

Lightweight and breathable, the Golden Hour Kurti is made for the bright energy of the Spring/Summer season, ensuring you stay stylish and comfortable all day long.

Product Details

Color: Golden Yellow Floral

Style: Front Button Kurti

Sleeve: Bell sleeves

Fit: Regular Fit

Season: Spring / Summer

Occasion: Casual, Day Outings, Brunch, Everyday Elegance

Style Tip:

Pair it with black or neutral trousers and minimal accessories for a chic, modern look.

Name: Maroon Muse
Description: Elevate your everyday style with our maroon muse Halter Kurti, designed for the modern woman who loves effortless elegance. Crafted in a rich rust-red tone with delicate floral motifs, this piece blends traditional charm with a contemporary silhouette. The sleeveless halter neckline adds a refined, structured look, while the statement back cut-out brings a subtle touch of bold femininity. Lightweight and breathable, it’s perfect for all-day comfort without compromising on style. Whether you’re heading out for brunch, casual outings, or a relaxed evening, this kurti pairs beautifully with leggings, pants, or even denim for a fusion look. ⸻ Key Highlights: • Premium breathable fabric • Elegant all-over floral print • Modern halter neckline • Stylish back cut-out design • Comfortable straight fit Style Tip: Pair it with black straight pants and silver oxidised jewellery for a chic, effortless look. ⸻ Occasion: Casual | Brunch | Day Out | Smart Casual ⸻ Care Instructions: • Hand wash separately in cold water • Do not bleach • Iron on low heat
